title: West White Spirit, Clear, 250ml, For Artists, Cleaning Tools & Bike Chains, Paintbrushes, Surfaces, Thin Paint, Paints, Coatings, Waxes, Varnishes, Degreasing, General Cleaning
features: MULTI USE West white spirit is a refined petroleum spirit used by artists to dilute oil colours and can also be used to clean brushes. The 250ml bottle has a safety cap and is easy to pour

PAINT THINNER You can also add amounts of Artists’ White Spirit to your oil paints as a thinner. It is more suitable for paint thinning than any other solvent as it will not affect the drying time of oil based paints

GENERAL PURPOSE A popular solvent for general purpose cleaning and degreasing. A mineral spirits and brush/tool cleaner for alkyd based paints. This mineral turpentine substitute is available in various sizes and leaves no residue

CAR PARTS CLEANER Ideal to clean car & bike parts as well as tools, works well to remove adhesive residue from non-porous surfaces, degreasing chains and greasy items, also ideal for cleaning graffiti and a great sticky stuff and label remover

HIGH GRADE As well as being used for cleaning and degreasing machine tools and parts, and in conjunction with cutting oil as a thread cutting and reaming lubricant, this high grade spirit has been designed to leave no sulphur residue for artists use
description: Product Description West white spirit is a refined petroleum spirit used by artists to dilute oil colours, can also be used to clean brushes. The 250ml bottle has a safety cap and is easy to pour. Box Contains 1 x 250ml bottle white spirit
